features: Elysium Bath oil & Bath bomb gift set vanilla & coconut.

This vanilla & coconut bath oil and bath bombs gift set is a delightful and soothing gift idea. This set can be a perfect way to pamper someone or to provide them with a relaxing and aromatic bathing experience.

The gift set includes a bottle of vanilla & coconut bath oil 100ml which is specially formulated with nourishing and moisturising ingredients. Bath oil is designed to hydrate and soften the skin while adding a delightful fragrance to the bathwater. Immerse yourself in the soothing blend of vanilla and coconut with this bath oil. It offers a delightful and tropical aroma that helps you relax and unwind.

In addition to the bath oil, the set contains four bath bombs. Bath bombs are compact, solid spheres that effervesce and dissolve in the bathwater, releasing their aromatic and soothing properties. Included are two 50g spearmint & peppermint bath bombs. A fresh scent with notes of jasmine, mint and eucalyptus, and two 50g Chamomile & jasmine bath bombs. A calming scent with notes of amber, cedarwood, jasmine and vanilla.

The combination of bath oil and bath bombs makes for a pampering and soothing bath experience, perfect for unwinding and relaxing after a long day. This gift set offers a complete bath experience, allowing the recipient to transform their bathtub into a spa-like retreat in the comfort of their own home.
description: Product description Elysium Bath oil & Bath bomb gift set vanilla & coconut. This vanilla & coconut bath oil and bath bombs gift set is a delightful and soothing gift idea. This set can be a perfect way to pamper someone or to provide them with a relaxing and aromatic bathing experience. The gift set includes a bottle of vanilla & coconut bath oil 100ml which is specially formulated with nourishing and moisturising ingredients. Bath oil is designed to hydrate and soften the skin while adding a delightful fragrance to the bathwater. Immerse yourself in the soothing blend of vanilla and coconut with this bath oil. It offers a delightful and tropical aroma that helps you relax and unwind. In addition to the bath oil, the set contains four bath bombs. Bath bombs are compact, solid spheres that effervesce and dissolve in the bathwater, releasing their aromatic and soothing properties. Included are two 50g spearmint & peppermint bath bombs. A fresh scent with notes of jasmine, mint and eucalyptus, and two 50g Chamomile & jasmine bath bombs. A calming scent with notes of amber, cedarwood, jasmine and vanilla. The combination of bath oil and bath bombs makes for a pampering and soothing bath experience, perfect for unwinding and relaxing after a long day. This gift set offers a complete bath experience, allowing the recipient to transform their bathtub into a spa-like retreat in the comfort of their own home. Directions Pour 100ml of bath oil into a warm bath. Place two 50g bath bombs (one spearmint & peppermint and one chamomile & jasmine) into the bathwater. Allow the bath bombs to dissolve and enjoy the soothing and aromatic experience. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Avoid contact with eyes. Use in a well-ventilated area. Do not use if you are pregnant or have sensitive skin. Keep out of reach of children. Avoid using in a bathtub with a surface that may be stained. Be cautious as the bath oil may make surfaces slippery. See more
